items.description: Research Privacy Impact Assessments (PIA) methodology, including its purpose, process, and key components.
Investigate Risk Assessments methodology, focusing on its application in data protection and privacy.
Explore Data Protection Impact Assessments (DPIA) methodology, detailing its requirements under GDPR and its differences from PIA.
Look into Security Assessments methodology, examining how it relates to data protection and privacy.
Identify other relevant methodologies related to data protection assessments, such as Threat Modeling and Compliance Assessments, and summarize their key features.
Compile findings into a structured report, highlighting similarities and differences among the methodologies.
